name: Hurghada
description: A vibrant Red Sea resort city known for its crystal-clear waters, coral reefs, and year-round sunshine.

name: Luxor
description: The world's greatest open-air museum, home to the Valley of the Kings, Karnak Temple, and thousands of years of pharaonic history.

name: Aswan
description: Egypt's southernmost city, where the Nile flows between golden deserts and ancient Nubian villages.

name: Sharm El Sheikh
description: A world-class diving and snorkeling destination at the tip of the Sinai Peninsula, with stunning coral gardens and luxury resorts.

name: Cairo
description: Africa's largest city — where the ancient pyramids of Giza meet a buzzing modern metropolis full of culture, cuisine, and history.
